data.command: export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gt prime --hook && gt mail check --inject

message.content:
[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-23T22:17 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

content.thinking:
The patrol count is 20, which hits the threshold for handoff. Per the instructions:

> If `patrol_count >= 20` → hand off

I should squash the current wisp and hand off to a fresh session. Let me also check the hooked wisp - it's `skogtown-wisp-wisp-14nhp` which also has all steps complete. There are also two other completed molecules showing.

Let me squash and hand off.
